name: Air-Cooled Chiller - Model ACC-1200
description: High-efficiency air-cooled chiller for commercial HVAC application
pdf_content:
SUBMITTAL DATA SHEET
Project: Office Tower Mechanical Upgrade

EQUIPMENT IDENTIFICATION
Manufacturer: ChillMax Corporation
Model Number: ACC-1200
Equipment Type: Air-Cooled Screw Chiller

PERFORMANCE DATA
Nominal Cooling Capacity: 120 tons
Full Load Efficiency: 1.05 kW/ton
IPLV: 0.75 kW/ton
Evaporator Leaving Water Temp: 44°F
Condenser Entering Air Temp: 95°F
Refrigerant: R-134a
Compressor Type: Twin rotary screw

ELECTRICAL SPECIFICATIONS
Voltage: 460V/3PH/60Hz
Full Load Amps: 145A per compressor
Minimum Circuit Ampacity: 195A
Maximum Overcurrent Protection: 250A
Control Voltage: 115V/1PH/60Hz

PHYSICAL SPECIFICATIONS
Dimensions: 144"L x 88"W x 94"H
Operating Weight: 8,500 lbs
Shipping Weight: 7,800 lbs
Refrigerant Charge: 185 lbs R-134a
Evaporator Water Volume: 45 gallons

COMMISSIONING CHECKLIST
□ Verify proper refrigerant charge
□ Check and adjust superheat settings
□ Calibrate all temperature and pressure sensors
□ Test capacity control from 25% to 100%
□ Verify proper oil level and pressure
□ Check vibration isolation effectiveness
□ Test all safety controls and alarms
□ Perform full-load and part-load performance test
□ Verify BAS integration and point mapping
□ Document refrigerant leak test results

Submitted: January 20, 2024
Page 1 of 3
